i: Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including enzyme-function categories) with standard 8-item set. 7alpha-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase is encoded by the HSD3B7 or related HSD genes.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Prolactin receptor' which is the PRLR protein) with standard 8-item set. PRLR encodes the prolactin receptor; mutations cause familial hyperprolactinemia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. STK11 (LKB1) is a serine/threonine kinase tumor suppressor; mutations cause Peutz-Jeghers syndrome.

FLAG: Gene name is a Wikidata Q-number (Q2786969) that was never resolved. This entry cannot be meaningfully used as a quiz question. Marked for deletion or manual resolution. Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced nonsensical distractors ('Wikidata item', 'Biological entity') with standard 8-item set.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Alpha-macroglobulin' hinting at the protein product) with standard 8-item set. AMBP encodes a precursor protein that is cleaved into alpha-1-microglobulin and bikunin.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 enzyme-function items) with standard 8-item set. ALDH3A2 encodes aldehyde dehydrogenase 3A2 (FALDH); mutations cause Sjögren-Larsson syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Desmoglein' which is the DSG1 protein) with standard 8-item set. DSG1 encodes desmoglein-1; autoantibodies against DSG1 cause pemphigus foliaceus.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Desmoglein' which is the DSG3 protein) with standard 8-item set. DSG3 encodes desmoglein-3; autoantibodies against DSG3 cause pemphigus vulgaris.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items with mixed cellular-component categories) with standard 8-item set. FBXL5 encodes an F-box protein that regulates iron homeostasis by targeting IRP2 for ubiquitin-mediated degradation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items with mixed molecular categories) with standard 8-item set. ADORA2A encodes adenosine receptor A2A; involved in dopamine signaling and is a target for Parkinson's disease drugs.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items with non-specific molecular categories) with standard 8-item set. F9 encodes coagulation factor IX; mutations cause hemophilia B (Christmas disease).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'RNA molecule' which is incorrect for this context) with standard 8-item set. NEB encodes nebulin, a giant scaffolding protein in sarcomeres; mutations cause nemaline myopathy.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. RPAIN encodes RPA-interacting protein, involved in replication protein A complex regulation.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. GCDH encodes glutaryl-CoA dehydrogenase; mutations cause glutaric acidemia type I.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. IVD encodes isovaleryl-CoA dehydrogenase; mutations cause isovaleric acidemia.

FLAG: Gene name is a Wikidata Q-number (Q3214685) that was never resolved. This entry cannot be meaningfully used as a quiz question. Marked for deletion or manual resolution. Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Updated distractors to standard 8-item set.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. MFGE8 encodes milk fat globule-EGF factor 8 (lactadherin), involved in phagocytosis of apoptotic cells.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. BECN1 encodes beclin-1, a key autophagy protein and tumor suppressor involved in lysosomal degradation pathways.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. CRAT encodes carnitine O-acetyltransferase, involved in fatty acid metabolism and mitochondrial function.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. FLAG: daf-2 is a C. elegans gene (insulin/IGF-1 receptor homolog controlling lifespan and dauer formation) — it is not a standard human gene. The human ortholog is INSR. This entry is incorrectly placed in the human health domain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. CTSD encodes cathepsin D, a lysosomal aspartyl protease; mutations cause neuronal ceroid lipofuscinosis type 10.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. FLAG: Catechol 1,2-dioxygenase is a bacterial enzyme (ring cleavage enzyme in aromatic compound degradation); it is not found in the human genome. This entry is incorrectly placed in the human health domain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. DSCAM encodes Down syndrome cell adhesion molecule, a neural cell adhesion protein overexpressed in trisomy 21.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. PTPN22 encodes protein tyrosine phosphatase non-receptor type 22; a key risk allele (R620W) is associated with type 1 diabetes, rheumatoid arthritis, and other autoimmune diseases.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. ANXA3 encodes annexin A3, a calcium-dependent phospholipid-binding protein.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. ABCA13 encodes ATP-binding cassette transporter A13; associated with psychiatric disorders.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. ACP2 encodes lysosomal acid phosphatase 2; mutations cause lysosomal acid phosphatase deficiency.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. ALDH3A1 encodes aldehyde dehydrogenase 3A1, highly expressed in the cornea where it protects against UV-induced oxidative damage.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. ANK2 encodes ankyrin-B, a membrane adaptor protein; mutations cause long QT syndrome type 4 and cardiac arrhythmias.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. GATA4 encodes GATA binding protein 4, a cardiac transcription factor; mutations cause congenital heart disease.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 7 to 8 items. GRIK4 encodes glutamate ionotropic receptor kainate type subunit 4.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 5 to 8 items. LAMP3 encodes lysosomal-associated membrane protein 3, a marker of mature dendritic cells.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (7 items including 'Codon' and 'Nucleosome' which are questionable contrast items) with standard 8-item set. TRNL1 is a mitochondrial tRNA-Leu gene (MT-TL1); mutations cause MELAS syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. NPAS3 encodes neuronal PAS domain protein 3, a transcription factor associated with schizophrenia risk.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. TICAM1 encodes TRIF (TIR domain-containing adapter inducing IFN-beta), a key adapter in TLR3/TLR4 innate immune signaling.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. CHI3L1 encodes chitinase-3-like protein 1 (YKL-40), a biomarker of inflammation and fibrosis.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. ITGB4 encodes integrin beta-4, a component of hemidesmosomes; mutations cause epidermolysis bullosa with pyloric atresia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. NRGN encodes neurogranin, a postsynaptic calmodulin-binding protein; a schizophrenia susceptibility gene.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. IYD encodes iodotyrosine deiodinase, which recycles iodine from mono- and diiodotyrosine during thyroid hormone synthesis.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items with coenzyme/cofactor categories) with standard 8-item set. AHCY encodes adenosylhomocysteinase; mutations cause hypermethioninemia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. LYST encodes lysosomal trafficking regulator (LYST/CHS1); mutations cause Chediak-Higashi syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. PTMA encodes prothymosin alpha, a nuclear protein involved in cell proliferation and chromatin remodeling.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. Mlip encodes muscular LMNA-interacting protein, involved in cardiac and skeletal muscle function.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. AATK encodes apoptosis-associated tyrosine kinase, involved in neuronal differentiation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. ABCA2 encodes ATP-binding cassette transporter A2, involved in neural development and lipid transport.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. ABCA3 encodes ATP-binding cassette transporter A3, essential for lung surfactant secretion; mutations cause fatal neonatal surfactant deficiency.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. ABCC11 encodes MRP8, a multidrug resistance transporter; variants determine earwax type and underarm odor.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. ABCG2 (BCRP) encodes breast cancer resistance protein, a drug efflux transporter affecting chemotherapy resistance and gout risk via urate transport.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. ACADS encodes short-chain acyl-CoA dehydrogenase; mutations cause short-chain acyl-CoA dehydrogenase deficiency (SCADD).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. ACADL encodes long-chain acyl-CoA dehydrogenase; mutations cause LCAD deficiency, a fatty acid oxidation disorder.
